item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 35s The first round of the NHL Playoffs might be the most underrated stretch on the entire spo
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 35s The first round of the NHL Playoffs might be the most underrated stretch on the entire sports calendar. Multiple games every day/night, all of them elimination stakes intensity from game one. Name a better two weeks in sports. I'm not sure you can. 4 48

item.title: MikeGarafolo: Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 2h Texas Tech QB Behren Morton shares a school, agent and trainer
item.description:
Around The NFL reposteó Mike Garafolo @MikeGarafolo · 2h Texas Tech QB Behren Morton shares a school, agent and trainer with Patrick Mahomes. And a playing style, too?
“Maybe a little bit. I’ve been told once or twice.”
His visit with @RapSheet and me last night on The Insiders 6 5 36 28 mil
